title: The Alliance Expands
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on the alliance expands within the Momonosuke, Heir of Kozuki storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: More import-tantly, inu and I are both retainers directly under Lord Oden himself! From the day Raizo showed up on this island,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The warriors of this island were prepared to give their lives!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: When it did come time to fight...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We were absolutely routed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That too by just one of Kaidou's squads.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oi! That's cause those bastards used that foul weapon of theirs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We may be able to come to terms with losing to the underhanded tactics of a cowardly enemy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Ughhhhh! ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But, next time... Fufu. Next time, things will be different! We will not make the same mis- take twice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We have our Trump card. Next time we fight, we'll show them the true strength of the minks!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We actually have some- thing to ask of you, Luffy- Dono!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You too, law- Dono!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: It pains me to ask favors of you after you both have already saved our lives, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: My comrades and I are in awe of your strength!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If our paths and desires are one,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: in the coming fight with Kaidou and the Shogun of the Wano Country,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We humbly request your help!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Woooooo! This is more than we could have ever hoped for!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Samurai and the Minks! That's a force even we'd look twice at!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nope.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why do I bother!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Have you lost your mind?! Say that again, I dare ya!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: One SEC, KINEMON! Forget he ever said that! Just sit tight while I beat some sense into this idiot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Luffy's got a point.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What-? Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: First come the Negotia- Tions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: No! No! Hit the damn brakes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And what are you? Just some figurehead, momo!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You said it! You are a huge bigshot, right!?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You're the leader of all these great warriors, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Yet all you can do is cry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's enough, Luffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You have some nerve sounding off on an 8- year-old child at a time like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: luffy. Heirs, you see,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Until they actually become adults, are not actually required to really do much.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: It's the job of the adults around them to aid and assist...

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: That's right() I'm sorry for all of that, my dear momo. That idiot captain of ours is a real meanie.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You are the one adult that shouldn't be around him at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You will never be able to learn about its entirety.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This is the real world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I am not sure if

summary: The Alliance Expands: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
